overall.description: Atmospheric game engine footage depicting a foggy mountain lake at night. The camera slowly pans across a misty waterfront revealing a distant castle silhouette against towering peaks, rendered with heavy volumetric fog and a stylized teal color grade.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty lakeside shoreline with distant castle view

agents.ego_description: standing still on the shoreline, slowly panning the camera to survey the foggy lake and distant castle

entered.detail: tall dark mountain silhouette rising behind the castle, partially obscured by fog
large stone castle or fortress visible through the mist on the far shore of the lake
calm water surface covered in heavy atmospheric fog and mist
dark evergreen trees framing the left side of the view
rocky and uneven ground at the water's edge in the foreground

segments.scene_description: A slow cinematic pan across a foggy mountain lake at night. The camera reveals a historic stone castle silhouetted against towering peaks through heavy mist, with dark pine trees receding to the left as the view opens toward the expansive water. The atmosphere is still and mysterious, with volumetric fog drifting across the calm lake surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow cinematic pan across a nocturnal mountain lake that gradually reveals a distant architectural silhouette. It begins by gliding past dark pine trees that recede to the left, slowly opening the field of view toward the expansive water. As the camera moves, volumetric fog drifts across the calm lake surface, enhancing the still and mysterious atmosphere. The scene then expands to reveal a historic stone castle silhouetted against towering peaks, emerging through the heavy mist to anchor the horizon.
